/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hesai_sdk_lib.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libhesai_sdk_lib.so -o libhesai_sdk_lib.so CMakeFiles/hesai_sdk_lib.dir/driver/hesai_lidar_sdk.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kilabor/isaac-go2-ros2/build/hesai_ros_driver/src/driver/HesaiLidar_SDK_2.0/libhesai:/home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib: libhesai/liblidar_lib.so libhesai/libudpParser_lib.so libhesai/libptcClient_lib.so /home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib/libssl.so /home/kilabor/miniconda3/envs/env_go2_real/lib/libcrypto.so libhesai/libserialClient_lib.so libhesai/libsource_lib.so libhesai/libplatutils_lib.so libhesai/liblog_lib.so
